name: Variable Frequency Drive - Model VFD-50HP
description: Variable frequency drive for pump motor control
pdf_content:
VARIABLE FREQUENCY DRIVE SUBMITTAL
Project: Water Treatment Plant Upgrade

DRIVE IDENTIFICATION
Manufacturer: PowerDrive Solutions
Model: VFD-50HP-480
Type: PWM Variable Frequency Drive
Application: Centrifugal Pump Control

ELECTRICAL RATINGS
Input Voltage: 480V, 3-phase, 60Hz ±10%
Output Voltage: 0-480V, 3-phase
Output Frequency: 0-60Hz
Motor HP Rating: 50 HP
Continuous Output Current: 65A
Overload Capacity: 110% for 60 seconds
Efficiency: 98% at rated load
Power Factor: 0.96 at rated load

CONTROL FEATURES
Control Method: V/Hz, Sensorless Vector
Speed Regulation: ±0.5% of set speed
Acceleration Time: 0.1-3600 seconds
Deceleration Time: 0.1-3600 seconds
Carrier Frequency: 2-16 kHz adjustable
PID Controller: Built-in with sleep mode

PROTECTION FEATURES
Overcurrent Protection: 150% for 60 seconds
Overvoltage Protection: DC bus >820VDC
Undervoltage Protection: DC bus <380VDC
Ground Fault Protection: Yes
Motor Overload Protection: Electronic thermal
Phase Loss Detection: Input and output

ENVIRONMENTAL SPECIFICATIONS
Ambient Temperature: -10°C to +50°C
Humidity: 95% non-condensing
Altitude: Up to 3,300 ft without derating
Enclosure: NEMA 12 (IP54)
Cooling Method: Forced air with redundant fans

COMMISSIONING PROCEDURE
1. Verify input power phasing and voltage
2. Check motor insulation resistance
3. Program motor nameplate data
4. Perform motor auto-tune procedure
5. Set acceleration/deceleration ramps
6. Configure PID parameters for process control
7. Test drive operation at 25%, 50%, 75%, 100% speed
8. Verify harmonic distortion <5% IEEE-519
9. Check cooling fan operation
10. Configure fault relay outputs
11. Test emergency stop function
12. Verify BAS communication (BACnet/Modbus)

Submittal Date: February 5, 2024
Prepared By: Controls Contractor
